initiativeName: CSV export for the billing dashboard
idea: Let billing admins export the current filtered invoice table to a CSV file from the dashboard, so they can reconcile in spreadsheets. The export must respect the active filters and column order the user is currently looking at.
decisions: ACCEPTED: server-side generation (stream from the existing invoice query, not client-side from the rendered DOM) so large accounts work and totals match the source of truth. ACCEPTED: filename `invoices-<ISO-date>.csv`. ACCEPTED: only the columns currently visible are exported, in their on-screen order. REJECTED: XLSX in v1 (CSV only). REJECTED: emailing the file (synchronous download only). OPEN-LATER: pagination beyond 50k rows.
constraints: Stack: Next.js + TypeScript, Postgres via Prisma. Reuse the existing `invoiceFilters` query builder. Money values must be exported as decimal strings, never floats. Must not introduce a new CSV dependency if the repo already has one.
repoContext: Dashboard table lives in app/(dash)/billing/invoices/. The server query is in lib/billing/invoiceQuery.ts. Auth/permission gate is requireBillingAdmin().
